title: nameHide
description: A minecraft bukkit plugin that allows players to scramble their usernames.
body:
This Minecraft plugin allows players to scramble usernames!

# Commands:


```
/hide true
```
 enables name scrambling

```
/hide false
```
 disables name scrambling


##  Requirements:
The only plugin you need is [TAB](https://github.com/NEZNAMY/TAB)
